c1.speaker: poppy
c1.line: Mr. Gibbons hi hello — the bunting, do you see the bunting, the LEFT side is four centimeters lower and the ceremony is in HOURS and the swan contingency does NOT cover bunting—

empathize.line: First big event. How are you holding up?

c3p.speaker: poppy
c3p.line: WILL ANYONE— I will notice, Mr. Gibbons. Fifty years of waiting deserves symmetrical bunting. Sorry — sorry, ladder, excuse me, coming through.

c3e.speaker: poppy
c3e.line: Holding up! Holding up is PLAN C and we are still very much on PLAN A which is 'everything is fine.' ...It's my first major event. Everyone who ever mattered to this district is coming. So. Plan A!

c4.speaker: poppy
c4.line: Tonight it all pays off. Fifty years, one vault, zero surprises. I have a laminated card that says exactly that.
